name: Shahi Murgh- Royal Chicken Cooked in Yogurt - India
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon cayenne pepper, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Put yogurt into a bowl. Beat lightly until smooth and creamy.
2. Add 1/2 teaspoon of salt, some black pepper, cumin, coriander, cayenne, and cilantro. Mix and set aside.
3. Using remaining salt and black pepper, season chicken pieces.
4. Heat oil in a nonstick pan over medium-high heat.
5. When oil is hot, add cardamom, cloves, cinnamon, and bay leaves. Stir and put in chicken pieces in one layer. Brown on both sides and remove to a large bowl. Continue to brown all chicken pieces.
6. Put almonds and raisins into the same hot oil. Stir quickly. The almonds will turn golden and raisins should plump up.
7. Return chicken and accumulated juices back into the pan.
8. Add seasoned yogurt, stir to mix, and bring to simmer.
9. Cover, turn heat down, and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring once or twice.
10. Remove cover, turn heat up, and reduce sauce. Turn chicken pieces as you do this.
11. Remove hard spices before serving.
